skills.name: COI Outreach
skills.description: Daily Circle of Influence outreach. A/B/C tier cadence (30/60/90 days). Sends via iMessage→SMS fallback or email.

skills.name: Redfin Fixer Scan
skills.description: Nightly scan of 18 South Bay regions for fixer-upper SFR listings. Scores via Claude vision. Auto-adds 7.0+ to sheet.

skills.name: Redfin Agent Outreach
skills.description: Daily outreach to listing agents from the Redfin Fixer sheet. Checks property status via Firecrawl before sending.

skills.name: Agent Email Campaign
skills.description: Drafts 50 Gmail outreach emails per day to real estate agents. Manual approval before send.

skills.name: Lead Tracker
skills.description: Monitors inbound leads from Google Ads and direct mail. Auto-logs to Lead Tracker sheet.

skills.name: Calendar Skill
skills.description: Screenshot-to-calendar event. Parse event details from an image and create a Google Calendar entry.
skills.triggerDetail: On demand — send screenshot to Thadius

skills.name: COI Addition
skills.description: Add a new contact to the Book of Business sheet via Thadius. Normalizes phone/email, assigns tier.
